motion_policy: deterministic source-preserving motion plus distinct proof graphics; no AI frog bodies; no paid video credits

beats.caption:
A FROG CAN
FREEZE SOLID
beats.must_show: real frog visibly freezing, no generated animal body

beats.voiceover: In winter, ice can form through much of its body.
beats.caption:
ICE FORMS
THROUGH ITS BODY
beats.must_show: ice/frost spreading through a frog-body silhouette

beats.voiceover: Its heart can stop for a while.
beats.caption:
ITS HEART
CAN STOP
beats.must_show: heart/pulse glow fading into stillness, no UI/readout

beats.voiceover: Sugar-like fluids help protect the cells.
beats.caption:
SUGAR HELPS
PROTECT CELLS
beats.must_show: cells surrounded by golden protective fluid/droplets

beats.voiceover: Then spring warms it up, and the frog starts moving again.
beats.caption:
SPRING WARMS IT
BACK TO LIFE
beats.must_show: warmth returns and frog/leaf scene shifts from cold to active spring

beats.voiceover: It is not magic. It is survival chemistry.
beats.caption:
NOT MAGIC
SURVIVAL CHEMISTRY
beats.must_show: real frog hero plus clean chemistry-like protective particles, no labels
